headlines.headline: Wrelal Financial to host investor day focused on renewable storage strategy

sentiment.reasoning: Investor days are routine corporate events that rarely provide immediate material financial impact.

headlines.headline: Wrelal Financial reports rising costs pressuring margins in supply chain optimization

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs pressuring margins indicate a persistent operational headwind that negatively affects bottom-line performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
